reviews.review_title: Best PCVR workspace and dev support
reviews.review_description:
You can work with 6 virtual monitors placed where you like.
Overay has a virtual PEN that you can use for 3D design. It helps me to explain my ideas to my wife.
It works like a charm if you are in the same network as your PC.
The discord community with the developer team helps a lot, and updates about new features and bugfixes

If you have any problems, go to Discord

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for continuing to use OVERAY DESK.
We'll continue improving the app to provide a seamless experience.

We truly appreciate your review and support.

reviews.review_description: I tried it after a friend recommended it, and compared to other apps, it feels much more flexible and lets me use mor monitors, which I really liked.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for your review! We're glad you're enjoying the flexibility and multi-monitor workspace. We appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
Have a pc problem but going to get developer support and try again!  A new day and I've no longer snapped.  Looking all the way back to a day ago I really should have contacted the developers before throwing my keyboard.

Full review when I get it working.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we apologize for the severe inconvenience caused by the PC crash and installation errors.

It is difficult to diagnose the exact cause based solely on the symptoms described. We need to check a few more details, such as whether there is a conflict with an antivirus program or if it's an incompatible OS environment.

If you could visit our official Discord channel, we will actively help resolve the issue so you can run the app properly.

https://discord.com/invite/hgKnEHfwkr

Hello,

We're sorry for the connection issue.

One common cause of connection issues is when the headset and PC are connected to different networks, so please check that they are on the same network.

If the issue persists, please reach out to us through our Discord support channel. We'll investigate the cause and help you resolve the problem.

We'll do our best to get you up and running as quickly as possible.

Discord Support:
https://discord.com/invite/hgKnEHfwkr

reviews.review_description:
Being able to freely float virtual monitors wherever I want and set up my own workspace has completely transformed my workflow. I'm also making great use of the Pen feature, which lets you draw or write right in the space.

I had a few questions while using the app and left a message in the official Discord community, and I really loved getting quick and friendly responses from the dev team.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you for your review! We're glad you're enjoying the workspace and Pen feature. We appreciate your support and will continue improving the app with future updates.
